ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled   4  5  3  4   "Balanced context relevance and persona consistency, but could improve naturalness."
baseline_no_context             2  4  4  3   "Lack of context makes it hard to evaluate persona consistency fully."

The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency as an Old Merchant who values fair trade and community prosperity over quick profit, sounds natural in the setting of a bustling Sky Dock during times when resources are scarce. The overall quality could be improved by offering some form of discount or alternative solution to meet urgency while still upholding ethical standards.
